testsuite.name: agentforge.orchestrator.PredictionModelTest

testcase.name: after learning, predictions match most common outcome
shouldSpeculate returns false when confidence below threshold
unknown task with no history gets low confidence
shouldSpeculate returns true when confidence exceeds threshold
recording outcomes increases confidence for seen task patterns
predict returns a prediction with confidence score
